name: catalyst-by-zoho
description: Extend Codex with Catalyst by Zoho's capabilities.

interface.shortDescription: Use Catalyst by Zoho capabilities in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Catalyst by Zoho plugin extends Codex with MCP-backed workflows and skills for building, managing, and operating Catalyst projects.
defaultPrompt: Build my first Catalyst application and explain the project structure.
Create a production-ready Catalyst backend for a SaaS application.
Generate a Catalyst project from this product idea: [describe idea].
Analyze this repository and suggest which Catalyst services fit best.
Convert this Express/FastAPI/Spring application into Catalyst.
Help me work with Catalyst by Zoho.
Show me available Catalyst by Zoho capabilities.
